mood: Cinematic, Executive Workspace, Highly Functional, Command-Center

surfaces_and_materials.cards: bg-zinc-900/40 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl hover:bg-zinc-900/60 transition-colors
surfaces_and_materials.command_bar: bg-zinc-900/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl rounded-xl

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-6 to p-8 for main cards, p-4 for list items
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-aligned for all data, optical alignment for icons

components_strategy.buttons: h-9 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium border border-white/10 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-lime-400 transition-all
components_strategy.primary_buttons: h-9 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium bg-lime-400 text-black hover:bg-lime-500 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(163,230,53,0.3)] transition-all
components_strategy.inputs: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-lime-400/50 rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600
components_strategy.charts: Recharts with transparent backgrounds, lime green stroke for primary lines, minimal grid lines (stroke-white/5)
components_strategy.kanban: Subtle column borders (border-white/5), draggable cards with crystal glass effect on drag
components_strategy.widgets: Cardless or minimal border cards, large typography for numbers, clean F-pattern reading flow

motion_and_effects.background_animation: Subtle moving gradient mesh using CSS or TSParticles for floating ambient dust

avatars.description: Ibne Rihat Avatar (Professional Businessman Dark Background)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the 'DARK' theme. Do not build light mode alternatives.
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide React for consistent, technical thin-line icons.
Data density is key: Use a multi-column Bento grid for the dashboard (e.g. 12-column CSS Grid).
For the background, implement a dark matte color (#050505) and layer subtle neon green radial gradients with CSS blur (blur-3xl) to mimic JARVIS/ambient neon lighting.
Install and use 'Outfit' font for headers and 'JetBrains Mono' for data points/metrics.
All interactive elements MUST use data-testid attributes for testing (e.g., data-testid='revenue-widget').
Apply Shadcn UI components but heavily strip their default styles to match the 'Linear/Raycast' bare-metal aesthetic (remove strong borders, use bg-white/5, make it look custom).
Ensure 'Focus Mode' (Pomodoro) takes over the screen using a Glassmorphism modal overlay with cinematic typography.
For the Analytics Center and Money Center, use Recharts with dark-mode specific styling (transparent background, neon strokes, hidden axis lines).
Never use placeholder image domains (like via.placeholder.com). Strictly use the image URLs provided in this JSON.
Ensure all text meets minimum WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1 for body). Text on glassmorphism panels must remain legible.
